name: Daxin Materials Corporation
summary: Daxin Materials Corporation provides display and green energy related fine chemicals in Taiwan. It offers semiconductor materials comprising laser release layers, temporary bonding adhesives, and photosensitive dielectrics; display materials, such as LCD, touch panel, and OLED materials; green materials consisting of battery materials; and anhydride monomers. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Taichung City, Taiwan.
